name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_srapc_uvw_tacp_data_delta_load
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_srapc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_tacp_data_delta_load' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`assetStatusDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`assetConditionDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`startLatitude` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`startLongitude` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`manufacturedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`constructedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`purchasedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`commissionedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`in-ServiceDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`warrantyEndDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`disposedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`serviceLifeEndDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`plannedDisposalDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`startKm` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`assetStatusDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`assetConditionDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`startLatitude` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`startLongitude` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`manufacturedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`constructedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`purchasedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`commissionedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`in-ServiceDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`warrantyEndDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`disposedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`serviceLifeEndDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`plannedDisposalDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`startKm` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'assetStatusDate|assetConditionDate|startLatitude|startLongitude|manufacturedDate|constructedDate|purchasedDate|commissionedDate|in-ServiceDate|warrantyEndDate|disposedDate|serviceLifeEndDate|plannedDisposalDate|startKm' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_srapc`.`uvw_tacp_data_delta_load`
